programs.title: Love Island UK: All Stars
programs.desc: It's that time again--all the naughtiest, funniest and unbelievable unseen bits from the Love Island All Stars.

programs.title: The Real Housewives Of Durban
programs.desc: The two camps continue to enjoy their holiday separately, cementing the divide in the group. Following the events of dinner, Angel attempts to apologize to Maria, while a skeptical Ameigh investigates what is on that recording.

programs.title: Lego Masters Australia
programs.sub_title: Dragon Race and Grandscapes - The Second Elimination
programs.desc: Tonight, our seven teams are first challenged to build tiny dragons that are small enough to fly on a drone, the winner gets an advantage for the second build which is Grandscapes,where another team will be eliminated this series.

programs.title: Barbie: Dreamhouse Adventures
programs.desc: Barbie embarks on adventures with friends and family -- including next-door neighbour Ken -- in this animated vlog of adventures filmed inside her family's new dreamhouse.

programs.title: Barney's World
programs.desc: When Vivie feels ignored, she fakes an injury and Barney helps her learn the importance in speaking up for herself. / Mel is frustrated at how long her broken arm is taking to heal, so Barney helps her understand that some things take time.

programs.title: LEGO DreamZzz
programs.desc: After locating Lunia’s hourglass, the team heads to the dream world’s sun, which holds more secrets than the object they’re searching for!
